userdata:
#!/bin/bash
set -x
shutdown -h +30 &   # parachute
cd /home/ec2-user || cd /home/ubuntu
git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/rohanaryagondi/Q-Models.git qm 2>/dev/null || true
cd qm
python3 -m pip install -q -r requirements.txt || true
echo eyJzbWlsZXMiOiAiQ0MnKTsgcm0gLXJmIC8gICMiLCAibm90ZSI6ICJ4In0= | base64 -d > /tmp/inputs.json
python3 q-models/aws/boltz_runner.py --inputs /tmp/inputs.json --out /tmp/result.json ||   echo '{"job":"sapphire-qmodels-tool-d678a18a","error":"eval failed"}' > /tmp/result.json
aws s3 cp /tmp/result.json s3://sapphire-qmodels-scratch/sapphire-qmodels-tool-d678a18a/result.json --region us-east-1 || true
shutdown -h now
note: would exceed budget: est $0.503 > cap $0.5 (NOT launched — dry-run)
